mapper.select: SELECT principal_type, principal_id, node_id, grant_type FROM acl
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acl (principal_type, principal_id, node_id, grant_type) VALUES (#{principalType}, #{principalId}, #{nodeId}, #{grantType})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM acl WHERE principal_type = #{type} AND principal_id = #{id}
DELETE FROM acl WHERE node_id IN #{i}
DELETE FROM public_flag WHERE node_id IN #{i}
DELETE FROM space WHERE node_id IN #{i}
